action.item: INSERT INTO wisdm_Models(ProjectID, ModelName, ModelType) SELECT ProjectID, "Generalized Additive Model", "gam" FROM core_Project WHERE ProjectID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT ProjectID FROM wisdm_Models WHERE ModelType = "gam")
ALTER TABLE wisdm_Maxent ADD COLUMN AutoFeatureSelection INTEGER
ALTER TABLE wisdm_Maxent ADD COLUMN UseHinge INTEGER
ALTER TABLE wisdm_Maxent ADD COLUMN UseLinear INTEGER
ALTER TABLE wisdm_Maxent ADD COLUMN UseQuadratic INTEGER
ALTER TABLE wisdm_Maxent ADD COLUMN UseProduct INTEGER
ALTER TABLE wisdm_Maxent ADD COLUMN UseThreshold INTEGER
ALTER TABLE wisdm_Maxent ADD COLUMN RegularizationMultiplier DOUBLE
ALTER TABLE wisdm_Maxent ADD COLUMN EnableClamping INTEGER
ALTER TABLE wisdm_Maxent DROP COLUMN MaximumBackgroundPoints
CREATE TABLE wisdm_GAM(GAMID INTEGER, ScenarioID INTEGER, SmoothingMethod INTEGER, BasisDimension INTEGER, PenaltySelectionMethod INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY (GAMID))
